So one of the key things I want to teach you guys this week, you don't have to know how to do any of this stuff. There are people way smarter than me who do that kind of stuff. So I had to Google, set up a podcast, who can hire and then find someone to hire to do that. One of the other stumbling blocks I think a lot of you guys can have throughout any of this business is trying to become good at doing all this kind of stuff. I have no idea how to set up a podcast. I literally, I record myself on my phone and then I email that audio to somebody else and then it shows up on iTunes. I have no idea how that works. I don't know what he does. He has like a little music intro at the beginning and the end and it just works. So there's people you can hire on anything. Fiverr.com, you can find someone for five bucks, can turn your, can make your music. I'm acting dumber than I am, but I want to illustrate a point though. So those of you guys who are really smart are going to struggle in this business. You're going to try to do everything. I can figure it out. Don't try to figure it out. The only thing you guys need to understand is the stuff we're talking about, the conceptual. All the stuff, this is an important part. All the tactics, all the little things is all stuff you can hire, you can learn, you can whatever, but focus on this bigger picture, the strategy stuff. Because the strategy what makes them money, the tactics are all things you can hire out, you can find people to do and it's not that important. So using sites like Fiverr.com, F-I-V-E-R-R.com is a great place for five bucks. People do almost anything you can dream of. Another site that I use a lot is Freelancer.com, Freelancer and Odesk.com. These are sites you can post anything in the world and people will do it for you. They'll bid, people will fight to do it for you for as cheap as possible. I graduated from Boise State with a stunning 2.1 GPA and I did that by outsourcing my homework to Romania and it got me to where I am today. Literally you can get anything you want done on these outsourcing sites. You can hire people to have majors in English to write English papers for you for like $2 an hour. You can hire programmers with PhDs in programming for 3, 4 bucks an hour to program anything you can dream of. So stop trying to be super, super smart, that doesn't help at all. There's people smarter than you and they work in third world countries and for 2 bucks an hour they can do what will take you days or years or months to figure out. I would say one of my super powers is I'm really good at hiring people for really, really cheap on these sites. That's really the reality of what it is. So learn how to do it. It's really easy and it will free you from trying to learn how to do all this kind of stuff. Thanks for asking me. I hope that helps. The next session we're going to be talking about how to charge more than your competitors because that's the key to scaling a business. You have to be able to charge them a lot and it's going to be fun. You're going to learn some cool stuff.
